deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated 5/29/26 - sellers moving back in to make repairs and updates. Short sale likely path if relisted. Underwater $93K-$143K. VA loan, $489.5K payoff, $2,843/mo mortgage.
deals.next: Await seller readiness to relist after repairs complete

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement - sellers moving back into property
Call completed - presented three paths, Chandler laid off, short sale preferred
Market analysis completed - underwater by $93K-$143K, direct comp 717 Jack Nicklaus at $519K

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed 5/14/26 at $259,900. Multiple showings in progress, second-look buyers most promising. Foundation crack flagged for inspection. Payoff $170K seller stated vs $192K public records. June deadline for NC relocation.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for 5/30, follow up on second-look buyers after pre-inspection

logs.m: Multiple showings active, second-look buyers returned for second showing - favorite property
Investor cash offer discussed at $176,300, keeping conversation open
MLS live - first showing feedback received, preinspection report shared
Listing agreement signed, photos received from ATG, going live May 13

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce sale, 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $257K (May 2026 estimate). Market range $275K-$315K. Recommended list $295K nets sellers ~$14.7K. CMA pulled, net sheet built.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender, schedule professional photos, get listing agreement signed

logs.m: Met at property 10am - confirmed payoff $255,578 as of Feb 17, pulled CMA, built net sheet
Prior clients from VA renovation loan purchase - going through divorce, need to sell

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000, closed and funded 4/27/26. Lien blocker resolved via notary on 4/21, all parties coordinated smoothly.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce, thank Sam VanDenheuvel, confirm commission received

logs.m: Officially closed and funded - transaction complete
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary, delivered to Chicago Title
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo - lien holder understanding and willing to work with us

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO, cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected, flooring this week, water meter pending. HouzzPro contractor doing demo and drywall. Listing agreement still needed to Priority Bank.
deals.next: Confirm electric meter install status, confirm water service setup, replace camera batteries, submit listing agreement to bank

logs.m: Visited property - cameras installed, electricians reconnected pole to meter, drywall complete, flooring starts tomorrow
Drywall crew patching remaining holes, sent photos to Kelly
Work officially started - Matt Toney (San Antonio Remodelers) dropping dumpsters

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: Land sale 20 acres, under contract at $113,000 with Espinoza family. Buyer agent Javier handling. TXR 1903 amendment sent to update third party financing. EMD not yet received, T-47 signed by seller waiting on notary confirmation.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received, confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier, verify Mrs. Espinoza email

logs.m: Steve called back - Alejandra sent new T-47 via DocuSign, Steve completed and returned, waiting on notary confirmation
New buyers Espinoza family identified, TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier, EMD not yet received
Clearing complete - Steve finished job and sent photos, first offer stalled on financing

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Rental listing arrangement ended 5/29/26. Jimbo backed out, Chris sent $500 to cover time and money. Ended on good terms, release signed.
deals.next: Confirm signed release received from Jimbo

logs.m: Release sent with acknowledgment that payment received - closed out clean
Jimbo backed out of rental arrangement, Chris sent $500

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Out of Corpus deal, still searching. Rental being sold, need to move faster. Pivoting to new construction. 301 W Saxet wholesale deal evaluated but too much for them. Zach Schaphorst pre-approved ~$122K. New construction search on hold.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search with builders, identify options that fit no HOA requirement

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet deal - too much for them, still actively searching
301 W Saxet wholesale deal discussed - Isaac connected them, property too challenging for their situation

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration and real estate opportunity. Trust-based, long-term relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally, ask permission for story, keep nurturing relationship

logs.m: Community connection identified - healing through gardens angle, permission needed for story

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person, investor interested in Schertz area. Buy box unknown, full intake pending. Budget and timeline to be determined.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, flip vs hold strategy

logs.m: Met in person - investor interested in Schertz area, no further details yet

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Inherited property, son now owns house behind Miss Pat. Deceased was avid gardener. Sensitive situation - need to assess if son is keeping, renting, or selling.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact, reach out with garden connection and honoring previous owner angle

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor son may own house, deceased was gardener - opportunity identified

leads.title: Bryce & Wife - VA Buyers
leads.detail: Bryce is dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting, looking to purchase San Antonio area home. Zero down, no PMI advantage.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info, qualify wife VA eligibility, connect with VA-approved lender

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 - wife is active military, recently moved from Ohio, looking to buy

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Fixer Buyer
leads.detail: Downline agent Jerome Gardner has buyer interested in property that needs work. Unique financing situation. Schertz/Cibolo area. Details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer, property, work needed, price range

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome - buyer needs fixer property, details pending

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship, helped Brandon get into real estate. Green Bliss rental setup with uncle Jimbo (ended). Mom Milagros is new construction buyer prospect, Grace Gardens or similar Lennar. $50K down, ~$1,000/mo payment target.
leads.next: Prioritize Milagros buyer agreement and builder visits, send PM company options to Brandon

logs.m: Buyer rep sent to Milagros - not yet signed, follow up to prioritize
Reached out to builders for options, rate buydown angles being explored

leads.title: Armando - Employee Buyer
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth, employee buyer program. No builder locked in, open to options. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/mo payment. No aging commissions on employee purchase route.
leads.next: Get Armando contact info from David Roth, pull new construction options from DR Horton, MI Homes, Lennar, other builders

logs.m: Confirmed no aging commissions on employee purchase route with 5% down and builder incentives

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year, interested in getting into real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Worth conversation about licensing, eXp prospects.
leads.next: Get contact info from Julie, reach out for intro call about licensing path and eXp opportunity

logs.m: Sent check-in text about Skool website, awaiting response
Referred by Julie during call - age 18, interested in real estate

leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes (under contract $275K). Wants intel on offers received and nearby listing details. Possible seller or buyer lead.

logs.m: Priority 2 - pull CMA and get everything together

priorities.title: Howell - New Construction Search
priorities.notes: Mike and Alice need new construction with no HOA. Multiple builder options with rate buydowns to explore. Zach pre-approved ~$122K.

followUps.text: Pull new construction inventory from DR Horton, MI Homes, Lennar, Grace Gardens, other builders
Filter for no HOA requirement, identify best rate buydown options
Present options with payment scenarios at different rate levels

priorities.title: Mill Path - Convert Showings to Offer
priorities.notes: Second-look buyers returned for second showing - they love the property. Pre-inspection report offered. June deadline for sellers creates urgency.

followUps.text: Confirm showing time for 5/30, follow up with buyer agent after pre-inspection
Monitor for any movement or offer submission from second-look buyers
Track other showing feedback, prepare for negotiation if offer comes in

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Get Listing Activated
priorities.notes: Payoff confirmed $257K. Net sheet built. CMA complete at $295K recommendation. Need updated payoff letter from lender before listing.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender - required before MLS launch
Schedule professional photography - key to selling in thin market
Get listing agreement signed - then move to MLS immediately

Pull new construction options from all builders - Grace Gardens, Cadence Springs, Randall Crossing, others
